steps.title: Compute total distance driven
steps.content: Rhett’s distance = speed × time = $35r$ miles. Jessica’s distance = $40j$ miles. Total distance = sum: $$35r + 40j$$ miles.

steps.title: Set up inequality for total distance under 220 miles
steps.content: The problem states the total distance was under 220 miles, meaning less than 220. Therefore $$35r + 40j < 220$$. This matches choice B — B is correct.
